If you could send me like five bullet points or two, three bullet points on what you want to do, I'll share that with the engineering team and I'll find you the right person.
Amazing.
Alex, thank you.
This was great.
Can't wait to dig into this.
And yeah, it's exciting.
Very exciting.
Likewise.
Cool, man.
Have a good rest of your night.
You too.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Lovable's data analysis, user behavior, and potential areas for collaboration with growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Lovable's current focus is on retention, particularly for paid users, due to its high potential impact](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [First-time user experience is a major drop-off point, with only 20-30% of users sending 5+ prompts after logging in](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [growthx.ai to analyze first 5-10 prompts per user to identify issues and develop solutions (e.g., templates, starter kits)](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Collaboration will prioritize activation/conversion improvement, with potential retention benefits as a bonus](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)

## Topics

### Current Data Analysis Capabilities

  - [Lovable can categorize projects by type (SaaS, internal tools, websites, prototypes)](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [AI-generated descriptions and categorizations for user projects](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Analysis focused on retained, paid users due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Basic last-touch attribution setup for top-of-funnel analysis](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

### Key Metrics and Challenges

  - Major drop-off in first-time experience: \<30% of users send 5+ prompts after login
  - [Mobile conversion rate is very low (1-2% page view to sign-up)](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [High volume of sign-ups (250-300k/week) but low conversion to active users](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - Limited analysis on users with \<5 prompts due to cost constraints

### Potential Areas for Improvement

  - [SEO optimization and showcasing user projects](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Mobile conversion rate enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Template marketplace development](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Algorithmic high-quality project discovery on explore page](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Scalable use case analysis for user projects](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

### growthx.ai's Approach and Offerings

  - [Experience with similar projects (e.g., Bolt)](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Creation of starter kits and templates based on user data](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Churn analysis and user behavior insights](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Content strategy tied to SEO and search intent](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Data Sharing and Next Steps

  - [Lovable to share:](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
    1.  Google Doc with project category analysis
    2.  Raw data behind the analysis (\~5k projects)
    3.  First 5-10 prompts per user with conversion/activity flags
    4.  Attribution dashboard
    5.  Total messages sent per user as LTV proxy
  - [growthx.ai to provide bullet points on technical integration needs](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aleksander to send agreed-upon data to growthx.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [growthx.ai to analyze first 5-10 prompts per user to identify drop-off causes and potential solutions](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [George to send bullet points on technical integration needs to Aleksander](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Aleksander to connect George with appropriate engineering team member for technical discussions](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Teams to begin sprint on data analysis and solution development once data is received](https://fathom.video/share/JUgH2qnEafNumdzPYZNTCFps8JsCPxMa?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)

action_items.description: Send Google Doc w/ project category analysis + raw data to George
Compile & send first X prompts/user, conversion status, self-appointed role, total msgs sent as LTV proxy
Check w/ team re data privacy concerns for sharing prompt data
Send attribution dashboard data to George
Send 2-3 bullet points on how to plug into Lovable website to Aleksander
Share George's website integration points w/ eng team; ID right person for George to discuss with
